pr.title: Record: PROTEUS v7 — 11L INT6 + LoRA TTT (mean val_bpb=0.9512, 3 seeds)

output.summary: 11-layer INT6 transformer using depth-scaled residuals and backward-looking per-document LoRA TTT adaptation during evaluation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: LoRA adapters are trained on validation documents during multi-epoch TTT evaluation.
techniques: INT6 uniform quantization with depth-scaled residual scaling
Backward-looking LoRA TTT per-document multi-epoch adaptation
Fresh model copy for torch.compile-compatible LoRA eval
